headline: Nvidia At A Discount? Tech Valuations Look Attractive And Mark Gibbens Says It's 'A Great Time to Get In' On PLTR, NVDA And GOOGL
summary: Following a five-week market selloff that pushed major averages into correction territory, Gibbens Capital Management CIO Mark Gibbens says the pullback has created a prime buying opportunity for long-term investors eyeing the tech sector. Nvidia At A Discount Despite recent geopolitical headwinds and inflation concerns weighing heavily on the broader markets, Gibbens remains decidedly bullish on technology.
